opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest feels incredibly tight, I can't catch a deep breath, and I feel like I'm going to pass out if I sit back. (Spouse on the call: he's gone pale and clammy and he's really struggling.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He's got much worse over the last half a day — he was told he had a viral inflammation around the heart a few days ago and now he suddenly can't breathe and nearly blacked out.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on and got dramatically worse over about the last 12 hours
symptom_narrative.character: the chest used to feel sharp and catch when breathing a few days ago, but now it's a constant heavy pressure, and the breathlessness is severe
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: he says it's frightening — like he can't get enough air and might faint
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the chest, with the breathlessness the worst part
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now rather than coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting up and leaning forward helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: leaning or lying back makes the breathlessness and discomfort much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: extreme lightheadedness, feels 'fuzzy' and a bit confused, cold hands, and a near-blackout when he tried to lean back
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no prior episodes like this; he was diagnosed with a viral inflammation around the heart 5 days ago
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can only sit on the edge of the couch leaning forward, cannot move around at all

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: told 5 days ago he had a viral inflammation of the sac around the heart (pericarditis)

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: high-dose ibuprofen for the heart-sac inflammation

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home, spouse present and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: he looks pale and sweaty and his lips and fingertips look a bit blue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: carer's visual impression over a video call, not a measured finding

objective_data_offered.value: he's sitting hunched forward on the edge of the couch and won't lean back, breathing fast and shallow
his hands feel cold and clammy and he seems confused and 'not quite with it'
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: spouse's report by touch and impression, not measured
